title: From decentralized Docs-as-Code to a centralized repository: Evolving Grab's documentation strategy

title: Docker lazy loading at Grab: Accelerating container startup times

Large container images for services like Airflow and Spark Connect were taking minutes to download, causing slow cold starts and poor auto-scaling performance.
